zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

boundary_human_trigger: Per JURY-POLICY-WEALTHCOM-001 §denied_transitions_require_boundary_human, the following transitions ALL required client_owner approval before Stage-1 could begin: scope confirmation, brand naming, tech stack, deployment target, token budget, integration approach, UPL handling, synthetic-data-only enforcement, Hawkeye independence rule. Stage-0 → Stage-1 transition is the boundary.
presentation_evidence: Conversation message containing 9 HD decisions with default proposals + UPDATED context after domain brief (OBBBA finding) presented to client.

HD-001.default_proposal: Build to actual current OBBBA law ($15M permanent), NOT PRD's repealed-TCJA-sunset framing

HD-003.default_proposal: Node 20+TS+Fastify · React 18+Vite+Tailwind · Postgres 16+pgvector · Python 3.12+FastAPI · Anthropic Claude · Playwright · Vitest+Pytest

HD-004.default_proposal: Docker Compose local-only at v0; production_surface=false

HD-005.default_proposal: Token SWAG low 150K · mid 400K · high 1.2M; reapproval at +15% delta

HD-006.default_proposal: Mock 17 of 19; real-shape contract+mock for Plaid-substitute and one Schwab-shape custody

HD-007.default_proposal: AI emits 'educational drafts for attorney review' only; attorney-of-record assignment required; legal-disclaimer overlay

HD-008.default_proposal: Synthetic data only at v0; no real PII or PHI

HD-009.default_proposal: Hawkeye independence rule: separate subagent given only artifact files (no chat-context handoff)

domain_findings_acknowledged_by_default_: FACT-OBBBA-001: TCJA sunset repealed; federal exemption permanently $15M (2026). Original ASM-003 invalidated.
FACT-NYDFS-PART500-2025: Effective Nov 1, 2025; added to standards baseline.
FACT-ADMT-CCPA-2027: ADMT rules effective Jan 1, 2027; added to AI-recommendation transparency scope.
FACT-YODLEE-STG-2025: Yodlee adapter context note (low impact at v0).

kernel_state_after_approval.boundary_human_required_reason_resolved: Checkpoint-#1 approval received. Next boundary-human trigger: CHK-2 (Stage-4 architecture release) per ENG-GOV-WEALTHCOM-001 §client_checkpoints.

next_immediate_actions: Mark TB-WC-2026-0425-001 (Stage-0 attractor pack) → accepted in TASKS.md.
Dispatch Stage-1 intake subagent with deep instructions (PRD atoms + domain brief + tailoring profile + critical findings + meta-attractor as inputs).
Subagent produces interrogation-record.json + spec-decomposition-record.json under runs/wealth-com/04_intake/.
Continue authoring downstream Stage-2/3/4 records in parallel where possible (per PERT ready candidates).

stage_0_audit_loop_closed.closure_evidence: Hawkeye F-001/F-009 patched; F-002 closed by domain brief; F-006/F-011 deferred-with-rationale or closed-by-procedure. patch-bead TB-WC-2026-0426-PATCH-001 records all closures. Independent Hawkeye CONDITIONAL_PASS verdict + client checkpoint approval = Stage-0 fully exited.
